name: zeffect_anim_shutdown_entry
description: zEffectAnim::ShutdownEntry cleans runtime node/hooks and owned animation entry arrays while preserving inactive entries.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zEffectAnim::ShutdownEntry: 220 unmasked mismatches after masking 60 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja and VC object bodies are both 320 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies inactive-entry early return and cleanup of runtime node/hooks, event streams, owned lists, and runtime sibling storage.
